title: Kidney-Metabolic-Fluid Pattern
reasoning_notes: Separate underlying renal disease vs acute decompensation vs metabolic/volume consequences before ICD mapping.
Pulmonary edema must not be inferred from CXR congestion alone; require physician assessment and/or treatment escalation context.
Electrolyte abnormalities: confirmed_from_chart only with lab and/or physician assessment plus active management/monitoring.
